title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 271.130 - Reclamation by owner
text:
271.130.  Reclamation by owner. — The owner of any stray may, within one year from the time of taking up, prove the same before some associate circuit judge of the county, and upon the payment of the fees herein allowed, and a reasonable compensation for keeping the stray, the owner shall be entitled to such property, with the increase, if any.
(RSMo 1939 § 14510) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12836; 1919 § 4326; 1909 § 827
